channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: AI apps break your stack — here’s the fix
item.description: Cut 800ms API latency to 180ms in production systems — the stateful architecture patterns 2026 teams actually use (Python 3.11, Redis 7.2, SQLite 3.45, vLLM 0.4.2).

item.title: Audit AI code: onboarding without the burn
item.description: Cut onboarding time 44% with AI-guided walkthroughs — but human guides still win for trust and MTTR. Real benchmarks, tools, and the mistake most teams make first.

item.title: 47% AI code debt in 2026
item.description: Cut AI code debt 80% with automated guardrails — performance, cost, and DX comparison with Semgrep 1.51, Rego, and real 2026 benchmarks.

item.title: AI UI generation: what it fixed and what still breaks
item.description: Cut frontend work 40–60% with AI UI generation tools — real wins, hidden Safari CORS bugs, and the exact prompts that paid off in 2026.

item.title: Debug async Python before it deadlocks…
item.description: Cut async Python bugs 60% by choosing trio over threads — concrete benchmarks, real outage stories, and version-pinned tools (Python 3.11, trio 0.24)

item.title: Signals: 5 state tricks that broke my app
item.description: Cut state update latency 75% with Signals in 2026 — Preact Signals Core 1.7.0 runs in React, Node, and Workers with 0.8 ms median updates and 3.2 kB bundle.

item.title: Stop false positives in CI scanning now
item.description: Cut false positives 97% with one triage pipeline — Snyk CLI 1.1325, Trivy 0.51.5, and Renovate 37.424 used to build a dynamic filtering system that reduced alerts from 127 to 3.2 per PR

item.title: AI observability: what P99 latency hides
item.description: AI models drift silently. Traditional APM misses 89% of model confidence drops. Start tracking prompt versions and semantic scores today to catch degradation before users do.

item.title: USSD in 2026: 30% cheaper than SMS for Africa fintech
item.description: Why I wrote this (the problem I kept hitting) I spent two weeks trying to replace a USSD flow that handled 120,000 daily sessions in Kenya.

item.title: Negotiate salary 2026 with AI resume tool
item.description: Cut AI clawback risk in 2026 offers — 7% higher total comp with redline and benchmark sheet

item.title: Prompt injection: the 0-day you overlooked
item.description: Prompt injection attacks cost €18k+ per breach in 2026 — here’s the exact pipeline teams use to stop them, with latency benchmarks and code you can deploy today.

item.title: AI scanners overlook real vulns
item.description: Cut false positives 60% using AI scanners the right way — combine LLM rules with CodeQL 2.14, AFL++ fuzzing, and runtime monitoring to catch real vulnerabilities instead of noise.

item.title: Replace Pinecone with Postgres for vectors
item.description: Cut vector DB costs 85% by replacing Pinecone with pgvector 0.7 — real benchmarks, $9k savings, and a 30-day migration guide for PostgreSQL teams.

item.title: Stop the writes — zero-downtime DB migrations
item.description: Cut zero-downtime migration time 80% by draining the write queue first — DMS, Debezium, RabbitMQ metrics, and the 3-question decision matrix used in 2026 production systems.

item.title: Meter dev-tool pricing in 2026
item.description: Cut dev tool churn 3× with usage pricing — $0.043 per active user, $1,124 ARR from 187 users, and a free-to-paid jump of 2.3×

item.title: AI memory systems: context that survives sessions
item.description: Fix AI agent memory loss across sessions in 2026 — 60% of teams hit this after moving from demo to prod. Learn where your context really vanishes and how to make it persist reliably.

item.title: Postgres 17 swallowed Redis, Kafka, Timescale
item.description: Cut AWS costs 56% by replacing Redis, Kafka, and TimescaleDB with Postgres 17 — connection pooling, pgmq benchmarks, and the schema mistake that cost us 3 days.

item.title: M-Pesa Daraja 2.0: your 2026 migration checklist
item.description: Migrate M-Pesa Daraja to 2.0 in 2026 and cut failed payments 82% — new headers, idempotency keys, and callback changes you must ship before March 31

item.title: Build self-healing pipelines with AI
item.description: AI agents cut false positives 5× in self-healing pipelines — when to use CrewAI 0.3 vs GitHub Actions 2026, with benchmarks, costs, and the 80/20 rule.

item.title: AI chat's hidden WCAG fails
item.description: WCAG 1.4.3 requires 4.5:1 contrast for normal text, but AI models often output markdown with light gray code blocks or soft pastel colors that fail this…
